he35802c1gb213g4cecg9b8agfdabce6fec48: Well met! I am a magical projection of Gale of Waterdeep, and if you see this manifestation, that means I have prematurely perished.
hca9cf060gaebag40c6ga4bdg0a9068ce093e: However, for reasons that cannot be disclosed, it is of vital importance that my death be remedied at your earliest convenience.
h9813d6d6ga5b8g42b7g95a0g2035680755a0: You may rest assured that I do not speak out of self preservation alone: many lives depend on my return to the living within the span of two days.
h714eb76bg78ddg4a54gbe43g8f0c876495db: I trust I have made myself clear?
haccf435dg19d6g46afgaea1g558b2d1053bc: I have upon my deceased person a magical item that can accomplish my return, but such is its value and rarity that it is protected by a multi-layered security protocol.
h7467dac3gcdb1g4bcag98cdg2da29013bd0f: I will now explain the protocol:
h0e4b3a20g17a1g44d5gbb13gffb913135871: Step one is to retrieve from my person a pouch I wear over my heart.
h3b277fb6gae2ag4206ga501g5cb8fdf47b4e: Next you must unthread the purple seam that seals it in a counter clockwise fashion. Do not touch any other coloured strand.
h01f8a9f9gd30cg4644g8cf1g1925a795310f: Inside the pouch you will find a folded letter and a tiny flute. Unfold the letter, and note the markings in the top and bottom corners. These are the notes you need to play.
h154b6fa1g3cc4g45f3ga7e0g01d8d9bf7f6e: Starting from the bottom right, play the notes in correct order - clockwise this time.
heeeaee2eg7ef0g4575g8957gcbdbcc0bc4e7: Upon completion of the tune, a magma mephit will appear, which will pose the following question: I'ss k'cha t'chiss n'aga?
h730d0beeg44f7g440dga56dg75eb5d0902e9: This is Ignan for: What is my name? The answer is: K'ha'ssji'trach'ash.
hbc2c142cg696fg40bfgba76g091e781f45a9: Pronounce the name correctly and the mephit will breathe on the letter. Stay clear because the little scamp can melt metal.
hbf098cfbga4e0g4df1g8367g045abd9d9655: Words will now appear on the letter's surface, effectively turning the letter into a Scroll of True Resurrection. Use it to bring me back to life.
h84a46cc1g162ag41e1ga4e2gec03ca5dc2be: Best of luck with the protocol! May my cold dead hands soon be refilled with the warmth of life so they can shake yours in gratitude.
